entries.doc_description: This document introduces "Edit Flows," a novel non-autoregressive generative model that uses a continuous-time Markov chain of edit operations (insertion, deletion, substitution) to enable flexible, variable-length sequence generation, outperforming autoregressive and mask-based baselines on tasks like image captioning and code generation.

This document is a research paper proposing "EditFlowSR," a novel symbolic regression method that iteratively refines mathematical expressions using token-level edit operations, and demonstrates its superior performance in accuracy, simplicity, and speed compared to existing neural and search-based approaches on benchmark datasets.
